name: Filter the client board by segment (active / leads / owes / cold)
description: User clicks the 'Owes' segment chip to focus on accounts with balances. The board filters; URL reflects the filter so it's bookmarkable.

persona.name: Lena Park
persona.context: Friday afternoon — chasing payments before the weekend.

preconditions: Account has clients across all four segments

steps.expect: Segment chips visible with counts: Active 12, Leads 7, Owes 4, Cold 9
Board shows only the 4 owe-ing clients; URL updates to /clients?segment=owes; chip shows selected state
Filter persists from the URL — board still shows only owes

steps.action: Clicks the chip again to deselect
steps.expect: Filter clears; URL drops the param

evaluationCriteria.check: Selected vs unselected chip states are obvious without color alone
Filter applies instantly — no full-page reload
Browser back navigates between filter states (history is pushed, not replaced)
Chips have aria-pressed reflecting selected state
